parameters.content:
## Automated B2B Referral Program Manager
This workflow automates your entire B2B referral process from end to end. When a referral is submitted via a form or webhook, it validates the data, thanks the referrer, alerts your sales team on Slack, logs the new lead in HubSpot (contact + deal), and triggers a nurture email sequence — with an automatic follow-up if the lead doesn't respond within 3 days.

### How it works

	•	A referral is submitted via a webhook connected to your form or website.
	•	The data is validated — incomplete submissions are rejected with a clear error.
	•	Referral details are extracted and structured for downstream use.
	•	A thank-you email goes to the referrer instantly via Gmail.
	•	Your sales team gets a real-time Slack alert with full referral details.
	•	HubSpot is checked for duplicates before creating a new contact and deal.
	•	A warm intro nurture email is sent to the referred lead.
	•	The workflow waits 3 days — if no reply, a follow-up email is sent automatically.
	•	All referral data is logged to Google Sheets for reporting and tracking.
	•	Errors at any stage are caught and posted to a Slack error channel.

### Setup Steps

	1.	Connect your referral form or website to the Webhook trigger URL.
	2.	Connect Gmail, HubSpot, Google Sheets, and Slack credentials.
	3.	Update the Google Sheet ID in the Sheets node with your tracking sheet.
	4.	Update the Slack channel names in the Slack nodes (#referrals and #errors).
	5.	Turn on the workflow.

## Step 1: Capture & Validate the Referral
This section receives the referral form submission and immediately checks that all required fields are present. If anything critical is missing — like the lead's email — the workflow stops and sends a clear error response so the submitter knows what to fix.

## Step 2: Notify Referrer & Alert Sales Team
This section immediately sends a thank-you email to the person who made the referral so they feel acknowledged. At the same time, a detailed Slack message is posted to the sales channel so your team can see the referral in real time and prioritise follow-up.

## Step 3: CRM — Deduplicate, Create Contact & Deal
This section searches HubSpot to check if the referred lead already exists as a contact. If they are new, a contact is created with referral source details and a new Deal is added to your pipeline. If they already exist, the workflow skips creation and routes directly to outreach — no duplicates, no data mess.

## Step 4: Nurture the Lead — Email + Auto Follow-Up
This section sends a warm intro email to the referred lead, mentioning who referred them. The workflow then waits 3 days and checks Gmail to see if the lead replied. If there is no reply, a second follow-up email is sent automatically. If they did reply, no follow-up is sent to avoid over-contact.

## Step 5: Log & Error Handling
This section logs the complete referral record — including referrer, lead, and CRM status — into a Google Sheet for your team's tracking and weekly reporting. A separate error catch node monitors the entire workflow; if anything fails at any point, a formatted error message is posted to your Slack #errors channel so nothing silently breaks.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "Thank you! Your referral has been received.", "referral_id": "REF-{{ Date.now() }}" }

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.referrer_name }},

Thank you so much for referring {{ $json.lead_name }} from {{ $json.lead_company }} to us!

We truly value your trust and will reach out to them shortly. We will keep you posted as things progress.

Referral ID: {{ $json.referral_id }}

Best regards,
The Team
parameters.subject: Thank you for your referral, {{ $json.referrer_name }}! 🙌

additionalFields.dealName: Referral — {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.lead_company }} via {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.referrer_name }}

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.lead_name }},

Your colleague {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.referrer_name }} at {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.referrer_company }} thought you'd benefit from what we do.

We help B2B companies automate their operations and scale without adding headcount. I'd love to show you how we have helped businesses like yours.

Would you be open to a quick 20-minute call this week? Just reply to this email and we can find a time.

Best regards,
The Team
parameters.subject: ={{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.referrer_name }} thought we should connect

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.lead_name }},

I just wanted to follow up on my email from a few days ago. {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.referrer_name }} spoke highly of you and we think there could be a great fit here.

Even a 15-minute conversation could be worth your time — just hit reply and we will sort it out.

Best regards,
The Team
parameters.subject: Just checking in — {{ $('Extract Referral Data').item.json.referrer_name }} intro

value.Follow-Up Sent: ={{ $('Did Lead Reply?').item ? 'No Reply — Follow-Up Sent' : 'Replied — No Follow-Up Needed' }}
